contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/program_activity.md
contract.description: Returns aggregated obligated and gross outlay amounts for each program activity within a toptier agency for a given fiscal year, including pagination metadata and advisory messages when data are unavailable.

toptier_code.description: Identifier of the toptier agency to query.
toptier_code.constraints: Required; accepts digit strings of length 3-4 that correspond to existing CGAC or FREC codes. Invalid codes return an HTML 404 page instead of JSON.

fiscal_year.description: Appropriations fiscal year for which to retrieve program activities.
fiscal_year.constraints: Optional; defaults to the current fiscal year (observed 2026). Accepts integers from 2008 through 2026 inclusive. Values below 2008 or above 2026 return 422 validation errors.

filter.description: Case-insensitive substring applied to program activity names.
filter.constraints: Optional; empty string behaves like no filter. Partial matches return activities whose names contain the provided text.

order.description: Sort direction for the selected field.
order.constraints: Optional; enum ['asc','desc']; defaults to 'desc'. Invalid values return 400 with an enum validation message.

sort.constraints: Optional; enum ['name','obligated_amount','gross_outlay_amount']; defaults to 'obligated_amount'. Invalid values return 400 with an enum validation message.

page.constraints: Optional; must be an integer ≥ 1. Defaults to 1. Pages beyond available data return empty results and may set 'previous' and 'hasPrevious' to null/false even when the echoed page number is greater than 1.

limit.description: Maximum number of results per page.
limit.constraints: Optional; accepts integers from 1 through 100 inclusive. Defaults to 10. Values outside the range return 422 validation errors; non-integer inputs return 400 type errors.

toptier_code.description: Echoes the requested toptier agency code.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year represented in the response.

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata for the result set.

total.description: Total count of matching program activities.

limit.description: Maximum number of results per page in this response.

next.description: Next page number when more data are available; otherwise null.

previous.description: Previous page number when available; may be null when requests exceed the available range.

hasNext.description: True when another page exists beyond the current one.

hasPrevious.description: True when a prior page exists; may be false when the request is beyond the available range.

results.description: Program activity aggregates for the requested fiscal year.

name.description: Program activity name; 'N/A' appears when data lack a specific categorization.

obligated_amount.description: Total obligated amount for the program activity; values may be zero or negative.

gross_outlay_amount.description: Total gross outlay amount for the program activity; values may be zero or negative.

messages.description: Array of advisory strings. Typically empty; includes availability warnings for fiscal years before 2017.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Live responses omit the 'totals' object documented in the reference spec.
page_metadata exposes a 'total' field instead of the documented 'count'.
Name filtering is case-insensitive and performs substring matches across program activity names.
Financial amounts may be zero or negative and should not be assumed positive.
Fiscal years before 2017 return 200 responses with empty results and a DATA Act availability warning in 'messages'.
Requesting pages beyond the available range returns empty results and can clear 'previous'/'hasPrevious' despite the echoed page number being greater than 1.
risks: Invalid toptier codes return HTML 404 pages instead of JSON errors.
Defaulting to the current fiscal year (observed 2026) can yield empty datasets if the fiscal year is not yet populated.
Requests for fiscal years before 2017 return 200 responses with empty results and an availability warning rather than an error.
Financial figures include zero and negative values, so downstream aggregations must not assume positivity.
Page size is capped at 100; integrations expecting larger batches must paginate.
Requests beyond the available page range yield empty results with pagination flags reset, which can obscure prior pages.

probes.notes: Default call uses current fiscal year (2026) and returns an empty dataset without the documented totals object.
Specifying fiscal_year=2024 returns populated data while totals remain absent.
Name filtering is case-insensitive and performs substring matching.
Pagination honors requested page and limit, returning next/previous pointers.
Requesting pages beyond the available range returns an empty result set and clears previous/hasPrevious.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'limit'. 'abc' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: Non-integer limit values are rejected with a 400 type validation error.
Fiscal years below 2008 are rejected with a 422 validation error.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"086","fiscal_year":2008,"results":[],"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: Fiscal years before 2017 return empty results with an availability warning message.
FY2017 is the first year with populated data and no availability warning.
Invalid toptier codes return HTML 404 pages rather than JSON errors.

mismatches: Spec requires a 'totals' object in 200 responses, but live responses across agencies and fiscal years omit it entirely.
Spec example documents page_metadata.count, while live responses provide page_metadata.total instead.
risks: Invalid toptier codes return HTML instead of JSON, requiring callers to handle content-type changes.
Defaulting to the current fiscal year can yield empty datasets if data is not yet published.
Requests for fiscal years before 2017 return 200 responses with empty results and an availability warning rather than an error.
Financial figures include zero and negative values, so downstream aggregations must not assume positivity.
Page size is capped at 100; integrations expecting larger batches must paginate.
Requests beyond the available page range yield empty results with pagination flags reset, which can obscure the presence of earlier pages.
